title: ilex decidua var. decidua
intro: Ilex decidua var. decidua, also known as American Holly, is a plant species native to eastern North America, characterized by its dark green, glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. American Holly has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional remedies for respiratory issues and wounds. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential anti-cancer and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable resource in the field of natural medicine.
